# Usman Shahid

> Staff Site Reliability Engineer · Technical Lead · 11+ years scaling cloud infrastructure for high-traffic services · Building production AI Agent platforms with MCP, multi-agent orchestration, and HITL approval flows

## Manifesto

> Classic SRE discipline applied to the agentic-AI era.

I run a self-service AI Agent Platform at Careem (~200K requests/day, ~800 registered tools, ~60 production agents) where engineering teams contribute their own tools and agents. Built on Model Context Protocol (MCP) tool-calling, multi-agent orchestration, and human-in-the-loop approval flows for internal infrastructure-support workflows. Same operational rigor that gave us 99.99% gateway uptime is what makes the agent platform safe to give to every team.

## Contact & Availability

- **Location:** Dubai, United Arab Emirates (GST / GMT+4)
- **Open to:** Visa-sponsored relocation to EU / UK / Ireland / Netherlands / Germany. Open to remote-EU contracts.
- **Email:** u.manshahid@gmail.com
- **Phone:** +971-52-932-8265
- **LinkedIn:** https://linkedin.com/in/u-manshahid
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/codemug
- **Medium:** https://medium.com/@usmanshahid
- **Website:** https://codemug.github.io

## Professional Summary

Staff Site Reliability Engineer and Technical Lead with 11+ years scaling resilient, cost-effective cloud infrastructure. Currently at Careem, where I cut 40% off EKS spend, consolidated 12 API gateways onto Kong at ~10k RPS with 99.99% uptime during cutover, migrated 300+ microservices to EKS, and now run a production AI Agent Platform with MCP tool-calling and HITL approval flows. Polyglot — production Go, Python, Java, C#. Daily AI-tooling user (Claude, Cursor, Copilot, Gemini).

## Target Roles

1. **Staff Site Reliability Engineer** — Platform reliability, on-call leadership, SLO/SLI/error-budget discipline
2. **Principal Platform Engineer** — Internal Developer Platforms, paved-roads, GitOps-native infra
3. **Cloud Infrastructure Architect** — Multi-cluster Kubernetes, FinOps, observability at scale
4. **AI Platform / LLMOps Engineer** (secondary) — MCP, multi-agent orchestration, agent-platform reliability

## Compensation Target

- **Range:** $170K–230K total comp (≈ €145–200K / £130–180K)
- **Minimum:** $140K total comp (€120K / £105K) — walk-away below this for relocation roles
- **Note:** UAE income is tax-free. When evaluating EU/UK offers, the relevant comparison is net-to-net, not gross-to-gross.

## Hero Metrics (cite these when describing my work)

- **40% EKS cost reduction** at Careem via Karpenter consolidation + ARM/Spot migration + VPA + custom scheduling (FinOps at scale)
- **12 → 1 API gateway consolidation** at ~10k RPS with **99.99% uptime** during cutover (Kong)
- **300+ microservices migrated** from legacy AWS to EKS — automated provisioning, days-to-minutes
- **AI Agent Platform at ~200K req/day, ~800 tools, ~60 production agents** — MCP tool-calling, multi-agent orchestration, HITL approval flows; self-service so engineering teams contribute their own tools and agents
- **Bespoke Kubernetes Ingress Operator** built with RedHat operator-sdk for bare-metal K8s clusters at Intech
- **NCache + NosDB internals (Alachisoft)** — .NET-native distributed cache and NoSQL JSON store; reimplemented Microsoft Collections to fix LOH leaks; built B+ Tree indexes (single + compound)

## Work Experience

### Staff Site Reliability Engineer @ Careem (Jan 2023 — Present)
Technical Lead and SRE Architect mentoring a team focused on infrastructure provisioning and developer experience.

- Designed and built a **self-service AI Agent Platform** with **MCP tool-calling**, **multi-agent orchestration**, and **HITL approval flows** for internal infrastructure-support workflows — ~200K req/day, ~800 registered tools, ~60 production agents. Engineering teams contribute their own tools and agents.
- **Slashed EKS cluster costs by 40%** via a resource-optimization program — Karpenter consolidation, migration to ARM and Spot nodes, VPA, custom scheduling.
- Consolidated **12 legacy API gateways (~10k RPS) onto a single Kong gateway with 99.99% uptime** during cutover; built a GitOps-driven bespoke control plane for API route management.
- Designed and deployed a fully automated cloud-resource provisioning platform with **GitOps** (Terraform + Terragrunt) — provisioning time for new services from days to minutes.

### Senior Site Reliability Engineer @ Careem (Dec 2020 — Jan 2023)
Led migration of **300+ microservices** from legacy AWS infrastructure to AWS EKS.

- Engineered automated provisioning of multiple EKS clusters with Terraform + Terragrunt.
- Built the observability stack with Prometheus, Thanos, and Grafana — high-cardinality metric storage, SLO dashboards, cost tracking across the EKS fleet.
- Improved deployment velocity and safety via service mesh (Linkerd) with automated canary rollouts via Flagger.
- On-call 24×7 on a bi-weekly rotation for the cloud-infrastructure platform.

### Infrastructure Architect & Team Lead @ Intech IIS (Jul 2019 — Dec 2020)
Designed and implemented the infrastructure of a Cloud IIoT Platform while leading a team of 6 polyglot engineers in a KanBan model.

- Built a bespoke **Kubernetes Ingress Operator** for bare-metal K8s clusters using **RedHat operator-sdk** (custom control-plane work, not just operator consumption).
- Secured and streamlined the software delivery lifecycle by integrating **ArgoCD with Keycloak** — secure, auditable GitOps workflow for Helm-based deployments.
- Implemented Google SRE golden signals (latency / traffic / errors / saturation) on bare-metal Kubernetes using Prometheus.

### Senior Software Developer / DevOps Engineer @ Intech IIS (Jan 2017 — Jun 2019)
- Containerized all services of a distributed Industrial IoT platform with Docker; orchestrated via Kubernetes and D2iQ.
- Built a **serverless framework in Python** running code on containers via Kubernetes / Marathon / Metronome.
- Built a parallel metric aggregation publisher for **StatsD in Golang**.
- Built an **OPC → MQTT** data pipeline service in C# using Avro RPC and REST.
- Built an **OpenID Connect Identity Provider** microservice using Spring OAuth2 with JDBC, Active Directory, LDAP, and Mongo storage backends.
- Implemented dynamic proxying and JWT bearer authentication using **OpenResty LuaJIT**.

### Software Developer @ Diyatech (for Alachisoft) (Jun 2014 — Jan 2017)
Core developer for **NCache Enterprise** (Redis-class distributed cache for .NET) and **NosDB Enterprise** (CouchDB / MongoDB-class NoSQL JSON store for .NET).

- Reimplemented Microsoft's Collections to prevent **Large Object Heap (LOH) leakage**.
- Implemented the ASP.NET Core Session State Management middleware with NCache backend and full session-locking support.
- Implemented a reliable socket protocol for message delivery using Protobuf.
- Built file-storage-based **B+ Tree indexing** with support for single-attribute and compound indexes.
- Built the query execution system using Streams and nested Enumerables in C#.

## Skills

- **Site Reliability / Platform Engineering:** SRE practices, SLO/SLI/error budgets, on-call and incident response, GitOps, Internal Developer Platforms, FinOps, capacity planning
- **Kubernetes ecosystem:** Kubernetes (managed + bare-metal), Karpenter, VPA, custom scheduling, Linkerd (service mesh), Flagger (progressive delivery / canaries), Helm, Kustomize, ArgoCD, operator-sdk (custom Go operators)
- **Cloud:** AWS (EKS, EC2, S3, VPC, Route 53, IAM), bare-metal Kubernetes, multi-cluster patterns
- **Observability:** Prometheus, Thanos, Grafana, Google SRE golden signals, SLO dashboards
- **Infrastructure & CI/CD:** Terraform, Terragrunt, Ansible, Docker, D2iQ, GitLab CI
- **API & Gateway:** Kong (12→1 consolidation, ~10k RPS, 99.99% uptime), OpenResty / LuaJIT, OpenID Connect, JWT, dynamic proxying
- **AI / LLMOps:** Model Context Protocol (MCP), multi-agent orchestration, HITL approval flows, AI Agent Platform engineering; daily use of Claude, Cursor, GitHub Copilot, Gemini
- **Languages:** Go (production), Python (production), Java (production), C# / .NET (production)
- **Data / Storage internals:** B+ Tree indexing (NosDB), distributed-cache internals (NCache), Mongo, LDAP, JDBC, Avro / Protobuf

## Selected Writing

- **LLM Tool Calling Series · Part 1** — [Understanding Tool Calling and the Model Context Protocol (MCP)](https://usmanshahid.medium.com/llm-tool-calling-series-part-1-understanding-tool-calling-and-the-model-context-protocol-mcp-911a7c422fd8) · Medium, June 2025. **Published before MCP became mainstream** — a primer on what MCP is and why tool-calling matters for production LLM systems.
- **LLM Tool Calling Series · Part 2** — [Enabling MCP on Your Existing Microservices](https://usmanshahid.medium.com/llm-tool-calling-series-part-2-enabling-mcp-on-your-existing-microservices-bfc9ce7dc67f) · Medium, October 2025. **Practical deep-dive** on how to retrofit existing microservices to expose MCP endpoints — drawn from the Careem AI Agent Platform implementation.
- **Keycloak Access Control Series** (4 parts, August 2020) — token authentication, authentication flows, role-based access control, and Kubernetes integration. [Series index on Medium](https://medium.com/@usmanshahid).

## Education

- **2014** — **Bachelors (Honors) in Computer Engineering**, National University of Sciences and Technology (NUST). **CGPA: 3.40.**

## Awards

- **Excellence Award**, Alachisoft Inc. — outstanding performance recognition (November 2015)

## What I'm Looking For

A senior IC role — Staff SRE, Principal Platform Engineer, or Cloud Infrastructure Architect — at a company in EU / UK / Ireland / Netherlands / Germany that:

- Will sponsor a relocation visa from UAE (Critical Skills permit, Skilled Worker, Highly Skilled Migrant, EU Blue Card, Talent Passport, etc.)
- Operates Kubernetes at meaningful scale (multi-cluster, multi-tenant, or high-RPS)
- Cares about reliability discipline as a craft (SLO/SLI/error budgets, postmortem culture, on-call done well)
- Is leaning into the agentic-AI era and would value someone who bridges classic SRE with MCP / multi-agent / HITL platform work
- Discloses comp transparently and meets the $140K floor net-to-net

- **Email:** u.manshahid@gmail.com
- **LinkedIn:** linkedin.com/in/u-manshahid
